scripts.release:dry: set -a && source .env && set +a && npx semantic-release --dry-run 2>&1 | grep -iE 'next release version|no release'
scripts.release:version: set -a && source .env && set +a && npx semantic-release --dry-run 2>&1 | sed -n 's/.*next release version is \([0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\).*/\1/p' | head -1 || echo 'No release pending'
scripts.gen:all: pnpm run gen:api && pnpm run gen:sdk
scripts.setup:python: python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.doc:generate: pnpm run docs:prebuild && DOC_GENERATE=true PORT=3456 pnpm --filter @eudiplo/backend exec nest start && pnpm run doc:format
scripts.doc:watch: source venv/bin/activate && pnpm run doc:generate && mkdocs serve
scripts.doc:build: source venv/bin/activate && pnpm run doc:generate && pnpm run compodoc && mkdocs build --strict
scripts.doc:init: source venv/bin/activate && pnpm run doc:generate && pnpm run compodoc && mike deploy --update-aliases main latest-dev && mike set-default main
scripts.doc:deploy-dev: source venv/bin/activate && pnpm run doc:generate && pnpm run compodoc && mike deploy dev
scripts.doc:deploy-major: source venv/bin/activate && pnpm run doc:generate && pnpm run compodoc && mike deploy --update-aliases
